name: TopoTuner: Topological Finetuning of Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.16637v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Full fine-tuning remains a strong way to adapt pretrained LLMs, but it updates all weights and can be expensive. LoRA reduces the number of trainable...
description: arXiv:2607.16637v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Full fine-tuning remains a strong way to adapt pretrained LLMs, but it updates all weights and can be expensive. LoRA reduces the number of trainable parameters, but it does not directly answer which pretrained components should be trained and which can be frozen during adaptation. We introduce TopoTuner, a topology-guided fine-tuning framework fo...
author: Abdulkadir Erol, Yash Mahajan, Vepaul Hariprashad, Baha Rababah, Santu Karmaker, Cuneyt G. Akcora, Mubarak Shah
